title: My Soul Is Sinking Down to Dust

verses.text: Instruct me in your precepts’ way; I think upon your works at length. My soul with sorrow melts away, according to your word give strength.
Keep falsehood far away from me and teach me all your law in grace. I choose to take the way of truth; I set your laws before my face.
LORD, let me not be put to shame; I cling with zeal to your decrees. I run the path of your commands, for you have set my spirit free.
